title: What is the 3rd Angel
wikitext:
[]: What is the 3rd Angel? Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 14, 2008 10:31 am I hope such thread doesn't exist yet; there're already quite a number of threads about the 'new' Angels. As we all know, some angels will be deleted; most renamed. But then, I seem to see no clue as to what will be the 3rd Angel. Provided that Adam is still the 1st Angel and Lilith 2nd, Sachiel is redesignated as the 4th and her following two siblings also have their numbers increased by 1. This leaves out a blank place: 3rd. What is the third angel then?

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Mon Jul 14, 2008 10:42 am Humans? Promoted from 18th to 3rd? Perhaps a new one we will see in flashback? Just speculation at the mo.

[]: Post by chee » Mon Jul 14, 2008 10:52 am You fools! It's GENDO!

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 14, 2008 11:40 am Expect inevitable overlap with this thread . One can forward all possibilities within reach -- including the omnipresent "Something we haven't seen yet" -- but there is as of yet no actual information whatsoever regarding the 3rd Angel's identity, meaning this thread can only float aimlessly in the mists of speculation. So the answer: nobody knows and you'll have to wait.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jul 14, 2008 2:06 pm That big thing on the moon, probably.

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Jul 14, 2008 3:11 pm I'm gonna guess...Kaworu. Think about it. If he was born due to the Contact Experiment with Adam, he would have been "born" before Sachiel and co, thus making him the 3rd oldest Angel, and thus the Third Angel. The fact that he was sleeping in a coffin reinforces this, as he would have been sleeping before Sachi came forward. Moon Giant is Adam, Lilith is in T.D. Adam is both the Embryo and the White Giant, as Seele can obviously clone Adam with no problems.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jul 14, 2008 3:16 pm I'll throw my two guesses into the ring and stay the hell out of the rest of this conversation. GUESS 1. It's the Eva on the Moon. All the Eva's to date have in some manner or form originated from Adam or Lilith, it would make sense that the next evolutionary stage of the Evangelion is to actually turn an Angel itself into an Eva. Hence Angel 3 becomes Eva Unit 06. GUESS 2. It's Rei. To simplify some of the series hulabaloo Rei has been altered to be the missing Angel. And that's all I'll say on the issue because this can become a really interesting one to watch. I give it two posts before someone says Shinji because he's remade the world. Shit, I jumped the gun on that one.

[]: Post by cat42 » Mon Jul 14, 2008 8:13 pm I say it's something we haven't seen yet, but seen evidence of. I think the giant outline we see at the beginning of the movie is an outline of the 3rd Angel, or where an Eva (probably Unit 00), landed during battle with the 3rd Angel.

[]: Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 14, 2008 10:24 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: GUESS 1. It's the Eva on the Moon. All the Eva's to date have in some manner or form originated from Adam or Lilith, it would make sense that the next evolutionary stage of the Evangelion is to actually turn an Angel itself into an Eva. Hence Angel 3 becomes Eva Unit 06.

[]: Post by universalperson » Tue Jul 15, 2008 12:02 pm I think its Shinji, but I'm weird that way.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 15, 2008 3:18 pm Retake?? In MY Webuild of Eva?! I wouldn't put it past Anno, and while such a thing would be sorta cool, I personally like the idea of Moon Giant being the 3rd Angel who just happens to be Sammael. ;) (*cough* An idea for a Rebuild fanfic I'll be doing. *cough* ) EDIT: Since I didn't mention it before, I think that while the Moon Giant is the 3rd Angel, and that Eva-06 was made from ver similar to how Eva-01 is born of Lilith.

[]: Post by Rodeo » Tue Jul 15, 2008 6:56 pm "The third, huh?" The moon giant obviously.

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:28 am Rodeo wrote: "The third, huh?" The moon giant obviously.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 16, 2008 3:38 pm Monk Ed wrote: Plus, he's talking about Shinji before and after that line, and the timing of when he turns his head to look up at the Earth implies that the last thing he said was meant to apply to Shinji.

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:54 pm Reichu wrote: But they show two cuts directly recycled from the "Kaji presents Adam embryo to Gendo" scene in the preview for 2.0, which casts some doubt on the Moon Giant being Adam. There's also the intimations that Adam exploded into "blood" at 2I and all.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 16, 2008 5:04 pm For some reason, I take Adams as being another name for the Angels like Lilin is for humanity. But I know Shiro thinks what you pointed out, Jimmy: Kaworu, Adam and MG are all different Adams. Not sure what I think but that would be interesting. Also: My first theory is/was that Moon Giant was a 3rd Seed of Life, Sammel but ver soul is in Mari; the reason they (MG and Mari) look the way they do is because they (or at least MG) was supposed to end somewhere else. But then I thought that was stupid because it sounded a bit too much like Second Impression.

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jul 16, 2008 5:43 pm Reichu wrote: MAYBE THERE'S A DOUBLE MEANING AND THEY'RE FUCKING WITH OUR HEADS!!!

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Wed Jul 16, 2008 9:27 pm No no no, wait, Lilith is the moon giant and Adam is in T.D. Because Misato is ALWAYS wrong.

[]: Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 16, 2008 10:04 pm Fazmotron wrote: No no no, wait, Lilith is the moon giant and Adam is in T.D. Because Misato is ALWAYS wrong.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 16, 2008 10:33 pm you know, once or twice this idea did sweep through my mind: could they have intentionally switched the location of the couple so as to confuse the audience?
